title: Scorecard Edit Pencil Icon Hover Effect
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the pencil edit icon on the scorecard to have a visible hover effect, so that it is clearly recognizable as a clickable button.
acceptance_criteria: Pencil icon displays a green circular background on hover
Icon color changes to white on hover
Hover effect clearly communicates the icon is clickable
ux_changes: Adds a green (#23E1AF) circular hover effect with white icon color to the scorecard pencil edit icon, making it visually identifiable as a button.
implementation_notes: Simple CSS addition targeting the fa-pencil class within the scorecard table.
